title: Simulation Persistence Manager Worker v1
determinism: Must persist only declared simulation state objects.
Must preserve explicit timeline and checkpoint lineage.
Must not write to AI-control roots.

notes: Future implementations may require timeline_id, checkpoint_id, cursor_id, or tick_ledger_id depending on command.
Phase J defines persistence contract surfaces only.
Future runtime phases may return storage refs, SQL row identifiers, and materialization metadata.
